meta-platforms.summary: NOK 1M/day × ~90 days (~€8M) Norwegian Datatilsynet behavioural-advertising ban (Jul 2023) on Meta — escalated to permanent EDPB urgent decision (Oct 2023).

grindr.summary: NOK 65M (~€6.5M) Datatilsynet fine (Dec 2021) on Grindr for sharing user data (including sexual-orientation inference) with ad partners without valid consent.
